form.formComment: Last start 9th over 2600m at this track, beaten 62m by Justagigolo Sallaz in 6-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 29. Two runs back won by 6m at Hyeres beating Hacker Julry in 6-9yo amateur drivers on November 9 at $22. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 9th (25m) over 2600m at this track, beaten 58m by Jolie Costardiere in 7-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 1. Before that 8th (25m) over 2850m at Hyeres beaten 43m by Keops Juth in 6-9yo amateur drivers handicap on February 8. Not doing enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Resumed after a 184-day break 10th (25m) over 2650m at Avignon beaten 63m by Ingenious Bond in 6-10yo amateur drivers handicap on April 1. Struggling at the moment but capable of turning things around.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 8th (25m) over 2025m at Paray-le-Monial beaten 32m by Jecko De Morge in 7-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 22. The run before 7th over 2850m at Feurs, beaten 42m by Laurelina in 5-10yo handicap on March 8 at $48. Suitably placed and can make amends.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at this track on March 29 over 2600m. Two runs back game effort when 2nd over 2650m at Carpentras, beaten 7.5m by Jolie Guerchaise in 6-7yo handicap on October 14. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.
